'''Samuel Halsall''' (born 18 August 2001) is an English professional [[rugby league]] [[footballer]] who plays as a {{rlp|ce}} or {{rlp|wg}}er for the [[Huddersfield Giants]] in the [[Super League]].

He previously played for the [[Wigan Warriors]] in the [[Super League]] and has spent time on loan from [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]] at the [[Newcastle Thunder]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

==Background==
Halsall played his amateur rugby league for the Shevington Sharks ARLFC.

==Career==
===Wigan===
Halsall made his Super League debut in round 14 of the [[Super League XXV results|2020 Super League season]] for the Warriors against [[St Helens RLFC|St Helens]] where Wigan went on to lose 42–0 against a much more experienced St Helens squad. Halsall started the match playing at {{rlp|wg}}, and became Wigan Warriors player #1104.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.superleague.co.uk/article/1587/round-14-fixtures-confirmed|title=Round 14 fixtures confirmed|publisher=Sky Sports |date=22 September 2020}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/wigan-vs-st-helens/teams/54569 |title=Starting Lineups - Wigan vs St Helens |publisher=Sky Sports |date=29 September 2020}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-league/54330327 |title=Super League: Wigan vs St Helens |publisher=BBC |date=29 September 2020}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/debut-a-moment-ill-never-forget-says-kai-pearce-paul/ |title=Debut a moment "I'll never forget" says Kai Pearce Paul |publisher=Love Rugby League |date=29 September 2020}}</ref>

===Newcastle Thunder===
On 4 June 2021, it was reported that he had signed for the [[Newcastle Thunder]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=4 Jun 2021|accessdate=4 Jun 2021|title=Newcastle bring in Super League duo on loan|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/newcastle-bring-in-super-league-duo-on-loan/}}</ref>

===Huddersfield Giants===
In October 2022, Halsall signed for [[Huddersfield Giants|Huddersfield]] on a three-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.giantsrl.com/article/8266/giants-make-double-swoop-for-exciting-duo |title=Jack Bibby and Sam Halsall join Huddersfield on three-year deals |date=9 October 2022}}</ref>
In round 9 of the 2023 Super League season, Halsall scored two tries for Huddersfield in a 26-14 victory over the [[Catalans Dragons]].<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/65261379|title=Super League: Huddersfield 26-14 Catalans Dragons - Sam Halsall brace helps Giants to victory|work=BBC Sport }}</ref>
In round 21 of the 2023 Super League season, Halsall scored a [[hat-trick]] for Huddersfield in their 28-0 victory over Castleford.<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/66397936|title=Super League: Castleford 0-28 Huddersfield - Sam Halsall hat-trick as Giants win fourth in a row|work=BBC Sport }}</ref>
Halsall played 16 matches with Huddersfield in the 2023 Super League season as the club finished ninth on the table and missed the playoffs.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.totalrl.com/ian-watson-explains-why-huddersfield-giants-underperformed-in-super-league-2023/#:~:text=HUDDERSFIELD%20GIANTS%20have%20been%20one,silverware%20once%20more%20this%20season./|title=Ian Watson explains why Huddersfield Giants underperformed in Super League 2023|website=www.totalrl.com|date=29 September 2023 }}</ref>
Halsall played 18 games for Huddersfield in the 2024 Super League season as the club finished 9th on the table.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.yorkshirepost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/huddersfield-giants-34-castleford-tigers-10-hosts-win-dead-rubber-but-2024-season-one-to-forget-for-west-yorkshire-rivals-4789784/|title=Huddersfield Giants 34 Castleford Tigers 10: Hosts win dead rubber but 2024 season one to forget for West Yorkshire rivals|website=www.yorkshirepost.co.uk}}</ref>
Halsall played 21 matches for Huddersfield in the 2025 Super League season as the club finished 10th on the table.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/huddersfield-giants-coach-sounds-nrl-warning-as-honest-admission-made-over-2025-shortcomings/|title=Huddersfield Giants coach sounds NRL warning as honest admission made over 2025 shortcomings|website=www.loverugbyleague.com}}</ref>

==Personal life==
Halsall was in a relationship with ''[[Hollyoaks]]'' actress [[Ruby O'Donnell]] from 2019 to 2023.<ref>{{cite news |last1=Anderton |first1=Joe |title=Hollyoaks star Ruby O'Donnell confirms she's dating rugby league player Sam Halsall |url=https://www.digitalspy.com/soaps/hollyoaks/a30377032/hollyoaks-ruby-odonnell-dating-rugby-league-player-sam-halsall/ |access-date=14 June 2023 |work=[[Digital Spy]] |publisher=([[Hearst Magazines UK]])}}</ref>
